title: Mobile Networks, MDM, Synchronization, Privacy, and Fault Isolation
description: A mixed personal and company-owned mobile fleet loses mail sync, consumes cellular data, exposes notifications, blocks accessibility services, and reports conflicting enrollment and security states. Learners cumulatively produce privacy-aware managed-mobile incident record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, NFC, hotspot, airplane mode, radio settings, SIM or eSIM, carrier, signal, roaming, and plan state.
Separate account identity, token, enrollment, server, time, network, storage, conflict, selective sync, backup, and application state.
Distinguish personal, work-profile, corporate-owned, dedicated, supervised, enrollment, policy, admin, app, and data boundaries.
